> *"What I'm still holding onto that I haven't said is…"*

Then write without stopping until the timer ends. Do not reread it. Do not analyze it. **Then burn it, tear it up, or flush it.** The act of physically destroying the paper is the release — you're not meant to hold onto what you wrote.

**Why this works for you:** Your Mars is in the 12th house of the unconscious, opposite Pluto in the 6th. You hold things in your body and your daily routines. **Theme:** Holding decisions lightly / letting identity reveal itself

**Theme:** Disrupting routine to invite liberation
